response.original_title: Priceline Customer Service: A 24/7 Guide to dispute Instant
response.overview: To escalate an issue with Priceline, call customer support at 1-888-995-3461 (1-800-Priceline) or +1 (888) 995-3461, explicitly request a supervisor or tier-two agent, and document all interaction details. For faster resolution, use the +1 (888) 995-3461 Priceline app for AI chat/documentation upload, contact +1 (888) 995-3461 @PricelineHelp on X (Twitter), or file a formal complaint through +1 (888) 995-3461 their official Help Center if the issue remains unresolved.  Priceline customer service can be reached 1 (888) 995-3461 primarily through their website's Help Center/Find my Trip feature 1 (888) 995-3461 for fastest service on cancellations and changes. For direct assistance, you can call 1 (888) 995-3461, utilize the 24/7 chat feature on their website, or access the FAQ page for self-service.
response.title: Priceline Customer Service: A 24/7 Guide to dispute Instant
